sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Atkore declares $0.33 quarterly dividend payable May 29
feed.summary: Atkore Inc. (NYSE:ATKR) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share, payable on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 19, 2026. This dividend yields 1.75% and was approved by the board of directors. The announcement follows strong financial results for Q1 fiscal year 2026, which saw the company beat analyst expectations for earnings and revenue.

feed.title: Atkore Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR) announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share of common stock. The dividend is payable on May 29, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 19, 2026. Atkore Inc. is a leading manufacturer of electrical products for various applications, including commercial, industrial, data center, and solar.

feed.title: Algoma Steel sets May 13 webcast after releasing Q1 results
feed.summary: Algoma Steel Group Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTL; TSX: ASTL) will release its 2026 first-quarter financial results after market close on May 12, 2026. A live webcast and conference call to review results and answer questions is scheduled for May 13, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. Investors can access the live webcast and archived replay on the company’s Investors website.

feed.title: Ascendis will post quarterly results before markets open May 7
feed.summary: Ascendis Pharma (ASND) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results and provide a business update on May 7, 2026, before the U.S. market opens. The company will also host a conference call and live webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss these results. A replay of the webcast will be available for 30 days after the event on the Investors & News section of their website.

feed.title: Ames National Corp director buys $2,358 in stock
feed.summary: Michelle R. Cassabaum, a director at Ames National Corp (NASDAQ:ATLO), recently purchased 84 shares of the company's common stock for $28.08 each, totaling $2,358. This transaction increased her direct ownership to 9,818 shares. The company's stock has seen a 68% gain over the past year and analysts suggest it appears undervalued, with a dividend yield of 3.43% maintained for 29 consecutive years.

feed.title: AptarGroup (NYSE: ATR) grows Q1 2026 sales, guides Q2 EPS $1.32–$1.40
feed.summary: AptarGroup reported an 11% increase in Q1 2026 net sales to $982.9 million, but net income and diluted EPS decreased due to softer profit metrics and operational issues. The company provided Q2 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $1.32 to $1.40, anticipating growth across all segments except for emergency medicine destocking. Gael Touya will be appointed as the new CEO effective September 1, 2026.

feed.title: 15M-share equity plan boost up for vote at AtlasClear Holdings (ticker: ATCH)
feed.summary: AtlasClear Holdings (ATCH) is seeking stockholder approval at its May 27, 2026 annual meeting to significantly expand its 2024 Equity Incentive Plan by 15 million shares, increasing the total reserve to over 15 million shares. This move aims to enhance the company's ability to attract and retain talent through stock-based awards, but a corporate governance analyst notes that such a large increase could lead to meaningful dilution. Stockholders will also vote on the election of six directors and the ratification of Haynie & Company as the independent auditor.

feed.title: Astronics Corp. Adjusts Valuation Metrics Amid Strong Financial Performance and Market Presence
feed.summary: Astronics Corp., a small-cap Aerospace & Defense company, has experienced a recent valuation adjustment, now being categorized as expensive despite strong financial performance. Key indicators show a P/E ratio of 80, Price to Book Value of 24.09, and an EV to EBITDA ratio of 40.98, all significantly above industry averages. The company has demonstrated positive financial performance with a 217.52% growth in operating profit for the quarter ending September 2025 and 100% institutional holdings, consistently outperforming the S&P 500 over the past three years.

feed.title: Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals | SCHEDULE 13G: Others
feed.summary: This article provides a document related to a SCHEDULE 13G filing for Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals, indicating actions taken by "Others" in connection with the company. The specific details of the filing are contained within the document itself.

feed.title: ARMOUR (NYSE: ARR) investors OK new stock plan, annual pay vote
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (ARR) stockholders approved a new Fourth Amended and Restated 2009 Stock Incentive Plan, authorizing an additional 1,000,000 common shares. At their April 30, 2026 annual meeting, shareholders also elected all eight director nominees, ratified Deloitte & Touche LLP as the 2026 auditor, approved 2025 executive compensation, and supported annual advisory votes on executive pay. The company confirmed its intention to hold "say-on-pay" votes annually, aligning with shareholder preference.

feed.title: ARMOUR Residential REIT Shareholders Approve Expanded Incentive Plan
feed.summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT shareholders approved an expanded stock incentive plan, re-elected directors, and ratified their independent auditor at their annual meeting on April 30, 2026. This expansion adds 1,000,000 shares for equity and cash awards, updating plan terms to include lower per-person limits, a 10-year term, and a clawback provision. The approvals signify strong investor support for the company's leadership, compensation strategy, and governance framework.

feed.title: Transcript: Asure Software Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Asure Software reported strong Q1 2026 results, with revenues up 23% year-over-year to $42.8 million, driven by their core business and advancements in platform, sales, and AI capabilities. The company is accelerating client adoption of Assure Central and has launched AssureWorks, an administrative services outsourcing model expected to significantly boost revenue. Asure Software reiterated its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting revenues of $159 million to $163 million and an adjusted EBITDA margin of 23% to 25%, reflecting confidence in achieving double-digit organic growth by leveraging AI tools like the Luna AI agent for efficiency.

feed.title: [10-Q] ASURE SOFTWARE INC Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: Asure Software Inc. reported a significant financial turnaround in Q1 2026, returning to profitability with a net income of $0.6 million compared to a $2.4 million net loss in Q1 2025. The company's revenue increased by 23% year-over-year to $42.8 million, primarily driven by strong recurring revenue growth and a substantial rise in hardware and professional services linked to time and attendance solutions. Asure Software continues its acquisition strategy and maintains compliance with its loan covenants, with future performance dependent on sustaining HCM revenue growth and managing its debt obligations.

feed.title: Apollo Commercial Real Estate (NYSE: ARI) sells $8.6B CRE loan portfolio to Athene
feed.summary: Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. filed an amended annual report (10-K/A) detailing a significant transaction: the sale of its commercial real estate loan portfolio to Athene for approximately $8.6 billion. The report also includes updated information on the company's directors, corporate governance, and executive compensation, noting changes to the management agreement following the portfolio sale. A special committee of independent directors oversaw the portfolio sale to Athene, another Apollo affiliate.

feed.title: [10-K/A] Arena Group Holdings, Inc. Amends Annual Report
feed.summary: Arena Group Holdings, Inc. filed an amended Annual Report (Form 10-K/A) for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The amendment provides detailed disclosures on directors, executive officers, compensation, ownership, related-party transactions, auditor fees, and exhibits, without altering previously reported financial results. It also highlights a refreshed leadership team, executive compensation details, and significant related-party financial dealings with Simplify Inventions and Renew Group Private Limited.

feed.title: Argan (NYSE:AGX) Director Sells $220,703.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Argan (NYSE:AGX) Director Alexander Lisa Larroque sold 350 shares of the company stock for $220,703, reducing their position by 50%. This transaction follows a strong quarter for Argan, where it surpassed earnings and revenue expectations, reported healthy profitability, declared a quarterly dividend, and approved a $200 million share buyback. Analysts have responded with increased price targets and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: Board pay and governance detailed in Aqua Metals (NASDAQ: AQMS) 10-K/A
feed.summary: Aqua Metals, Inc. filed an amendment to its 2025 annual report, providing comprehensive disclosures on its board of directors, executive compensation, stock ownership, related-party transactions, and auditor fees. The filing details the compensation of its executive officers, including equity-based incentives and severance provisions, alongside the structure and independence of its four-member board. Key financial figures, such as a 2025 net loss of $22.6 million and specific related-party financings, are also highlighted.

feed.title: SEG Opportunity Fund holds 9.32% of Auddia (NASDAQ: AUUD)
feed.summary: SEG Opportunity Fund, LLC has reported a beneficial ownership of 9.32% in Auddia Inc. (NASDAQ: AUUD), holding 500,000 shares with shared voting and dispositive power. This filing is a passive investment disclosure, indicating no transactional intent. The stake is based on 5,364,050 shares of Auddia's common stock outstanding as of April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Richard Nottenburg Sells 12,500 Shares of Applied Digital (NASDAQ:APLD) Stock
feed.summary: Richard Nottenburg, a Director at Applied Digital, sold 12,500 shares of the company's stock on April 28th for $400,000, reducing his ownership by 5.36%. This transaction occurred as the company reported a quarterly EPS miss of ($0.36) and a 139.3% YoY revenue increase to $108.55 million. Despite negative margins and return on equity, analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $44.33, while institutional investors and hedge funds continue to hold significant stakes in APLD.

feed.title: BofA Securities Maintains Ares Capital Corp(ARCC.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $20.5
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Ares Capital Corp (ARCC.US), while reducing its target price for the stock to $20.5. This revised target price comes after the analyst firm evaluated the company's financial prospects and market conditions.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of Themes Gold Miners ETF (NASDAQ:AUMI)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of Themes Gold Miners ETF (NASDAQ:AUMI) by summarizing its performance based on various indicators. It details the signals from oscillators and moving averages across different timeframes, and includes a section for frequently asked questions about technical ratings, oscillators, pivots, and moving averages. The analysis concludes with a neutral summary rating for AUMI, while noting conflicting signals from weekly and monthly ratings.

feed.title: Archrock keeps quarterly dividend at $0.22, up 16% from a year ago
feed.summary: Archrock (NYSE: AROC) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.22 per share for Q1 2026, which annualizes to $0.88 per share. This dividend is consistent with the payout from Q4 2025 and represents an approximately 16% increase compared to Q1 2025. The dividend will be paid on May 19, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 12, 2026.

feed.title: Forafric Global Delays 20-F Amid Revenue Slump
feed.summary: Forafric Global (AFRI) has delayed the filing of its Form 20-F (Yearly Report) for the financial year ended December 31, 2025, due to needing more time to finalize its financial statements. The company anticipates a sharp revenue decline for 2025, with sales estimated at $160 million to $180 million, significantly down from $274.2 million in 2024, primarily due to lower crushed volumes of wheat in Morocco and an overall decrease in sales. Management clarified that the delay is procedural, not indicative of an auditor change or internal control failure, and expects to file within the 15-day extension period.

feed.title: Assured Guaranty buys $6m in Sound Point Meridian Capital shares
feed.summary: Assured Guaranty and its affiliated entities have bought 242,718.447 common shares of Sound Point Meridian Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ:BDC) for a total of $6 million. This transaction occurred on April 30, 2026, at a price of $24.72 per share, and raises the collective holdings of the reporting owners to over one million shares of BDC. The purchase was made as BDC's stock, currently trading at $112.48 with a market capitalization of $4.96 billion, appears undervalued according to InvestingPro analysis, showing a P/E ratio of 19.21 and a PEG ratio of 0.9.

feed.title: Australian Oilseeds (COOT) to pay US$5,326,840 for 51% of RentBuddyUK
feed.summary: Australian Oilseeds Holdings Limited (COOT) has agreed to acquire a 51% stake in RENTBUDDYUK LIMITED, a UK-based provider of rent guarantee and rental management solutions, for US$5,326,840. The payment will be made in three tranches, with the transaction expected to close by the end of May 2026. This acquisition represents a strategic expansion for Australian Oilseeds into the UK rental services market.

feed.title: Anika Therapeutics’ CEO Stephen Griffin buys $149,880 in company stock
feed.summary: Anika Therapeutics' CEO, Stephen Griffin, acquired 12,200 shares of the company's common stock for $149,880 after a recent stock drop. This purchase increased his direct holdings to 36,163 shares and occurred despite the company reporting strong Q1 2026 financial results that exceeded expectations. The context suggests a CEO's confidence in the company following a market dip.

feed.title: Anika Therapeutics (ANIK) CEO buys 12,200 shares in open market
feed.summary: Anika Therapeutics' President and CEO, Stephen D. Griffin, purchased 12,200 shares of the company's common stock on April 30, 2026, at a weighted average price of $12.2853 per share, totaling approximately $150,000. Following this open-market transaction, Griffin directly holds 36,163 shares of ANIK. This insider buying signals positive sentiment from the company's leadership regarding its prospects.

feed.title: Annovis Bio (ANVS) seeks approval to expand 2019 equity incentive plan at 2026 meeting
feed.summary: Annovis Bio (ANVS) is seeking stockholder approval at its virtual 2026 Annual Meeting on June 17, 2026, to expand its 2019 Equity Incentive Plan. The proposed amendment would increase the total share reserve from 4,000,000 to 5,500,000 shares and raise the maximum individual annual grant limit from 400,000 to 600,000 shares. Stockholders will also vote on other matters, including the election of directors, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor, and advisory proposals on executive compensation and its frequency.

feed.title: Acadia Healthcare EVP granted 37,510 shares | ACHC Insider Trading
feed.summary: Acadia Healthcare's EVP, Brian Farley, was granted 37,510 shares of common stock as part of his compensation, valued at $0.00 per share. These shares will vest over three years, beginning on April 10, 2027. Following this grant, Farley directly holds 144,185 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: Large share and equity plan votes in Amaze Holdings (NYSE American: AMZE) 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Amaze Holdings (NYSE American: AMZE) is seeking stockholder approval for several key proposals at its June 12, 2026, virtual annual meeting. These proposals include electing seven directors, ratifying Wipfli LLP as auditor, approving a new 2026 Equity Incentive Plan with an 8,300,000-share pool and an evergreen feature, and significantly increasing authorized common shares from 100,000,000 to 750,000,000. Additionally, the company is asking to approve the conversion of senior secured convertible notes above a 19.9% exchange cap, which could lead to significant dilution for existing holders.

feed.title: APi Group Corp (APG) Shares Fall 6.0% -- GF Value Says Still Overvalued
feed.summary: APi Group Corp (APG) shares recently fell 6.0% to $45.72, yet GuruFocus' GF Value indicates the stock is still significantly overvalued by 76.3% compared to its intrinsic value of $25.93. Despite a lower P/E ratio compared to its historical median, the stock's valuation rank is 1/10, raising concerns for potential investors. Insider selling of $153.1 million with no buying activity further signals caution regarding APG's future performance at current price levels.

feed.title: Ambitions Enterprise posts its 2025 annual report on the SEC site
feed.summary: AMBITIONS ENTERPRISE MANAGEMENT CO. L.L.C (AHMA) has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on April 30, 2026. This report, available on the company's investor relations website and the SEC's site, provides a comprehensive overview of the company's financial performance, governance, and risk factors. Key figures from the report include 2025 MICE revenue of $17.2M and tourism revenue of $2.2M, alongside significant revenue and operating income growth in H1 2025.

feed.title: [ARS] AGENUS INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by Agenus Inc. (AGEN) on April 30, 2026, noting a neutral sentiment and low impact. It provides an overview of the company's recent news, SEC filings, and stock data including market cap and industry.

feed.title: Axcelis Unveils Purion H6: Next-Generation High Current Ion Implanter for Advanced Semiconductor Manufacturing
feed.summary: Axcelis Technologies Inc. (ACLS) has announced the Purion H6, a next-generation high current ion implanter designed for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. This press release, delivered via Quantisnow, highlights the company's continuous innovation in the technology sector. Quantisnow, a real-time market data platform, provided this insight along with related analyst ratings and SEC filings for Axcelis.

feed.title: Andersons (ande) director Bowe sells $70,254 in common stock
feed.summary: Patrick E. Bowe, a director at Andersons, Inc. (NASDAQ:ANDE), sold 900 shares of the company’s common stock for $70,254 on April 29, 2026. This sale occurred near the stock's 52-week high after a significant 109% return over the past year. In other news, The Andersons reported strong fourth-quarter earnings, beating analyst expectations, and amended its credit agreement.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Patrick Bowe Sells 900 Shares of Andersons Inc (ANDE)
feed.summary: Patrick Bowe, a Director at Andersons Inc (ANDE), sold 900 shares of the company on April 29, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern where Bowe has sold a total of 60,900 shares over the past year with no purchases. Andersons Inc's stock is currently trading at $78.06, which is significantly overvalued according to its GF Value of $39.63, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.97.

feed.title: Vistra Corp Stock Warning Signs | FRA:0V60
feed.summary: GuruFocus has detected two severe warning signs for Vistra Corp (FRA:0V60), urging potential investors to exercise caution. The article also provides a detailed example using Apple Inc. financials, highlighting good signs like a high Piotroski F-Score and expanding operating margins, alongside medium warning signs such as insider selling and the stock price being near its 10-year high. This serves as a template for the type of analysis offered by GuruFocus for Vistra Corp.

feed.title: NextEra Energy, Inc. Shs Unsponsored Canadian Depository Receipt Hedged Reg S Cash Flow – TSX:NEE
feed.summary: This article presents the cash flow data for NextEra Energy, Inc. (TSX: NEE), including operating, investing, and financing activities. The free cash flow for Q1 2026 was -806.77 million CAD, while the total for 2025 was 4.41 billion CAD, with operating cash flow at 17.15 billion CAD. The data is provided through Q1 2026, offering insight into the company's financial performance.

feed.title: CF Industries Holdings | 4: Statement of changes in beneficial ownership of securities-Director White Celso L.
feed.summary: This document is a statement of changes in beneficial ownership of securities for Celso L. White, a Director at CF Industries Holdings. It serves as a Section 4 filing, indicating a change in their holdings.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE: CL) is set to release its first-quarter earnings on Friday, May 1, with analysts expecting an increase in earnings per share and revenue. Several top-performing analysts have recently revised their price targets and ratings for the stock, indicating varied expectations ahead of the earnings call. The company recently increased its quarterly cash dividend from 52 cents to 53 cents per share.

feed.title: Adelson, Davis inducted into Nevada Business Hall of Fame
feed.summary: Dr. Miriam Adelson, philanthropist and major shareholder, and Mark Davis, owner of the Las Vegas Raiders and Aces, have been inducted into the Nevada Business Hall of Fame. The ceremony, held at The Venetian Expo, recognized their significant contributions to making Las Vegas a world-leading tourist destination, particularly through their impact on the casino industry and sports tourism. Both highlighted their efforts in business and community development, with Davis acknowledging those who helped bring the Raiders to Las Vegas and Adelson emphasizing the importance of integrated resorts for business travelers.

feed.title: RTX Corporation (RTX) Announces 7.4% Dividend Increase to $0.73
feed.summary: RTX Corporation (RTX) has announced a 7.4% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.73 per share, payable on June 11. The company demonstrates strong potential with a GF Score™ of 87/100, driven by solid growth and profitability. Despite this positive news and significant contract wins, there has been notable insider selling totaling $32.7 million in the past three months, which investors should consider alongside the company's valuation and market position.

feed.title: Fidelity National (FIS) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.44 Per Share
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.44 per share, maintaining its previous distribution, with a forward yield of 3.78%. The company anticipates a 30% revenue increase in 2026 due to advancements in AI and banking technology, positioning itself for growth in the financial technology sector. Despite a high P/E ratio, FIS shows solid growth potential and profitability according to its GF Score™, though financial strength remains a concern.

feed.title: Gilead buys Arcellx (ACLX) for $115 per share plus $5 CVR
feed.summary: Gilead Sciences has completed its acquisition of Arcellx (ACLX) for $115 per share in cash, plus a contingent value right (CVR) of an additional $5 upon achieving a specified milestone. This transaction was finalized on April 28, 2026, with Gilead's subsidiary purchasing all outstanding Arcellx shares and merging with the company, making Arcellx a wholly owned subsidiary. As a result, major shareholder New Enterprise Associates no longer holds any beneficial ownership in Arcellx.

feed.title: Agencia Comercial Spirits (NASDAQ: AGCC) outlines whisky risks and $120M AI pivot
feed.summary: Agencia Comercial Spirits (AGCC) has filed its annual report (Form 20-F), detailing its core business in Taiwanese whisky distribution and a new strategic pivot into AI computing infrastructure, including a non-binding letter of intent for USD120M in NVIDIA B300 server leases. The report outlines significant business risks such as reliance on major whisky customers, inventory management issues, competition, and geopolitical tensions in Taiwan and Indonesia, which could affect its whisky operations and AI expansion. Despite robust revenue growth of 145% in 2025 primarily from international bottled whisky sales, net income decreased due to lower gross margins and increased operating expenses related to IPO preparations and new business evaluation.

feed.title: Vistra (VST) Announces Quarterly Dividend Increase to $0.229
feed.summary: Vistra Corp (VST) announced a slight increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.229 per share, reflecting a 0.4% rise. Despite a high P/E ratio of 72.74, suggesting potential overvaluation, the company boasts a strong GF Score of 86/100, driven by impressive growth metrics. However, insider selling activity totaling $1.6 million over the past three months raises cautionary flags for investors.

feed.title: Adamas Trust anticipates 5 to 6 BPL rental securitizations in 2026 as Constructive turns profitable
feed.summary: The article states that Adamas Trust is projecting a significant increase in build-to-rent (BPL) rental securitizations, expecting to see 5 to 6 such deals in 2026. This forecast comes as Constructive, a key player in the sector, has reportedly achieved profitability.

feed.title: Adagio Medical (ADGM) outlines 2026 director elections and auditor vote
feed.summary: Adagio Medical Holdings, Inc. (ADGM) has detailed the agenda for its upcoming virtual 2026 annual shareholder meeting on June 16, 2026. Stockholders will vote on the re-election of two Class II directors, Orly Mishan and Sean Salmon, and the ratification of WithumSmith+Brown, PC as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. The proxy statement also provides compensation details for executives, including CEO Todd Usen and CFO Deborah Kaster, and outlines the company's governance practices and significant investor holdings.

feed.title: Executive pay and board elections at ACCESS Newswire (ACCS) 2026 virtual meeting
feed.summary: ACCESS Newswire (ACCS) will hold its 2026 virtual annual meeting on June 26, 2026, where stockholders will vote on the election of four directors and the ratification of Cherry Bekaert LLP as the independent auditor. The proxy statement details executive and non-employee director compensation for 2025, including CEO Brian Balbirnie's total compensation of $339,000, and outlines the company's clawback policy for erroneously awarded incentive compensation. As of April 30, 2026, the company had 3,882,143 shares outstanding, with key shareholders including Brian Balbirnie and Topline Capital Management.

feed.title: AIxCrypto explores decentralized computing for real-time AI agents
feed.summary: AIxCrypto (NASDAQ: AIXC) announced a non-binding collaboration framework with Chutes AI to explore decentralized compute infrastructure for supporting AIxC's AI agent and application-layer ecosystem. This partnership aims to evaluate the use of decentralized AI inference for tasks like model routing, real-time processing, and managing multi-agent interactions, which are crucial for scaling AI-native applications. Both companies will assess commercial and operational terms in separate agreements, emphasizing an infrastructure-first approach to AI development.
